name: webxemay
description: ``` webxemay/ ├── backend/       ← NestJS API (port 3001) ├── frontend/      ← Next.js Customer (port 3000) ├── admin/         ← React Vite Admin (port 5173) └── database_mysql.sql ```

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,ADMIN" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin"
